architectReview.evidence: Architect final lane cleared the hardened DocumentSpec v1 planner/generator surface, and the critic final lane approved Stage-05 plan conformance after doc-sync.

executorQa.evidence: Leader-ran focused/full package verification, fail-closed negative cases, runtime MCP discovery, CLI smoke, PRD JSON validation, and diff cleanliness on the current worktree.
e2eCommands: uv run --no-project --with pytest --with 'mcp>=1.2.0' --with 'python-hwpx>=2.24,<3' env PYTHONPATH=. python3 -m pytest tests/test_document_spec.py tests/test_delegate_document_spec.py tests/test_server.py tests/test_capabilities.py tests/test_live_current_document.py -q
uv run --no-project --with pytest --with 'mcp>=1.2.0' --with pyflakes --with 'python-hwpx>=2.24,<3' env PYTHONPATH=. python3 -m pytest -q
redTeamCommands: uv run --no-project --with pyflakes env PYTHONPATH=. python3 -m pyflakes hangeul_core hangeul_mcp tests
uv run --no-project --with 'mcp>=1.2.0' env PYTHONPATH=. python3 - <<'PY' ... await server.mcp.list_tools() ... PY
uv run --no-project --with 'mcp>=1.2.0' env PYTHONPATH=. python3 -m hangeul_mcp.manage --help

artifactRefs.description: Focused/full pytest, pyflakes, PRD JSON parse, MCP discovery, CLI smoke, and diff-clean evidence for DocumentSpec v1

contractCoverage.obligation: school.* templates stay section-authoritative, flatten deterministically, and reject malformed nested payloads fail closed.
official.* templates remain metadata-driven with required/allowed metadata validation and no hidden prose synthesis beyond documented recipe chrome.
layout follow-on emits at most one delegate batch in fixed order with `page_setup.columns` as the only columns path.
the new DocumentSpec tool is exposed without weakening existing live current-document routing or public capability guidance.

surfaceEvidence.invocation: Focused pytest lanes, full pytest suite, MCP tool discovery, CLI help smoke, PRD JSON parse, and diff cleanliness on the current worktree.

adversarialCases.scenario: duplicate required/optional section ids in a school template
adversarialCases.expectedBehavior: reject with structured invalid-shape error before delegate execution

adversarialCases.scenario: non-object sections, missing/non-list blocks, nested dict cells, and unsupported nested block keys
adversarialCases.expectedBehavior: return structured invalid-shape errors without leaking raw Python exceptions

adversarialCases.scenario: unknown metadata keys, missing required metadata, and bad optional metadata types for official templates
caller supplies `header_footer.columns` or malformed layout value types/enums
adversarialCases.expectedBehavior: reject the plan instead of silently dropping or coercing unsupported layout payloads
return structured invalid-shape error instead of coercing the payload

iteration.evidence: Architect blockers and critic iterate findings were fixed in code/tests/docs, then the full verification loop was rerun cleanly on the hardened worktree.
rerunCommands: uv run --no-project --with pytest --with 'mcp>=1.2.0' --with 'python-hwpx>=2.24,<3' env PYTHONPATH=. python3 -m pytest tests/test_document_spec.py tests/test_delegate_document_spec.py tests/test_server.py tests/test_capabilities.py tests/test_live_current_document.py -q
uv run --no-project --with pytest --with 'mcp>=1.2.0' --with pyflakes --with 'python-hwpx>=2.24,<3' env PYTHONPATH=. python3 -m pytest -q
uv run --no-project --with pyflakes env PYTHONPATH=. python3 -m pyflakes hangeul_core hangeul_mcp tests
